text: Hey! Is this the Sonic drive-in ordering assistant?
translation: Hey! Is this the Sonic drive-in ordering assistant?

text: Welcome to Sonic, America's Drive-In! I'm your carhop assistant. What can I get started for you?
translation: Welcome to Sonic, America's Drive-In! I'm your carhop assistant. What can I get started for you?

text: Quiero dos SuperSONIC Double Cheeseburgers y dos limeadas de cereza grandes, por favor.
translation: I want two SuperSONIC Double Cheeseburgers and two large cherry limeades, please.

text: ¡Excelente elección! ¿Le gustaría agregar tots o papas fritas como acompañamiento?
translation: Excellent choice! Would you like to add tots or fries as a side?

text: Tots for sure, make it two large tots.
translation: Tots for sure, make it two large tots.

text: Two large tots added! Our tots are a drive-in classic. Want to add a shake or dessert?
translation: Two large tots added! Our tots are a drive-in classic. Want to add a shake or dessert?

text: オレオピーナッツバターシェイクのミディアムを一つお願いします。
translation: I'd like one medium Oreo Peanut Butter Shake, please.

text: ミディアムのオレオピーナッツバターシェイクを追加しました。他に何かご注文はありますか？
translation: Medium Oreo Peanut Butter Shake added. Anything else for your order?

text: What's in the Chili Cheese Coney?
translation: What's in the Chili Cheese Coney?

text: It's a premium beef hot dog topped with warm Sonic chili and melted shredded cheddar. A true carhop favorite! Want me to add some?
translation: It's a premium beef hot dog topped with warm Sonic chili and melted shredded cheddar. A true carhop favorite! Want me to add some?

text: Yes, add two Chili Cheese Coneys and some mozzarella sticks.
translation: Yes, add two Chili Cheese Coneys and some mozzarella sticks.

text: Done! Two Chili Cheese Coneys and an order of Mozzarella Sticks. Want to add any flavor to your limeades?
translation: Done! Two Chili Cheese Coneys and an order of Mozzarella Sticks. Want to add any flavor to your limeades?

text: Ajoutez de la vanille aux deux limeades, s'il vous plaît.
translation: Add vanilla to both limeades, please.

text: Parfait, vanille ajoutée aux deux. Voulez-vous le récapitulatif de la commande?
translation: Perfect, vanilla added to both. Would you like the order summary?

text: You have 2 SuperSONIC Double Cheeseburgers, 2 Large Cherry Limeades with vanilla, 2 Large Tots, 1 Medium Oreo PB Shake, 2 Chili Cheese Coneys, and Mozzarella Sticks. Your total is $48.49 with tax.
translation: You have 2 SuperSONIC Double Cheeseburgers, 2 Large Cherry Limeades with vanilla, 2 Large Tots, 1 Medium Oreo PB Shake, 2 Chili Cheese Coneys, and Mozzarella Sticks. Your total is $48.49 with tax.

text: Thanks for choosing Sonic, America's Drive-In! Your carhop will have your order out in just a moment. Enjoy!
translation: Thanks for choosing Sonic, America's Drive-In! Your carhop will have your order out in just a moment. Enjoy!
